message:
fix(net): remove redundant `as u64` cast on usize::MAX in WebSocket frame codec

The WsError::PayloadTooLarge max field already accepts a u64, and usize::MAX
coerces to u64 without loss on 64-bit targets. The explicit `as u64` cast was
flagged as a no-op clippy lint. Removing it eliminates the unnecessary cast
while preserving identical behavior on all supported platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
